title: Ancient World
description: Ice and fire based modpack with a many mods based around food, vague warfare, and eternal suffering.
body:
## Ancient World Ever find a GOT roleplay server in the search for an ice and fire public server? Maybe you haven't, but I certainly have. Ancient World is an ice and fire based modpack with a many mods based around food, vague warfare, and eternal suffering. With a community rallying around the many wonders the ice and fire mod has to bring, one wonders what else 1.20.1 has to offer aside from childish bickering over who gets to pilot the warship artillery. Featuring a public and fairly active dragon slayer and mother community server, there's a level 5 dragon for everyone to assassinate.
Feedback
